Class PgVectorFilterExpressionConverter

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.filter.converter.AbstractFilterExpressionConverter
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.pgvector.PgVectorFilterExpressionConverter
All Implemented Interfaces:
FilterExpressionConverter
public class PgVectorFilterExpressionConverter extends AbstractFilterExpressionConverter
Converts Filter.Expression into PgVector metadata filter expression format. (https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/functions-json.html)

The output is a complete SQL predicate ready for use in a WHERE clause (e.g. metadata::jsonb @@ '...'::jsonpath). Single quotes are properly escaped, and JSONPath member names are always wrapped in double quotes with \ and " JS-escaped.

Author:
Muthukumaran Navaneethakrishnan, Christian Tzolov

    • doSingleValue

      protected void doSingleValue(Object value, StringBuilder context)
      Serialize values for PostgreSQL JSONPath expressions with proper escaping.

      Values are JSON-serialized, then single quotes are escaped for SQL embedding.

      Specified by:
      doSingleValue in class AbstractFilterExpressionConverter
      Parameters:
      value - the value to serialize
      context - the context to append the representation to
